name: quantcoder-plugin
description: Marketplace for the QuantCoder Claude Code plugin.

metadata.description: Claude-compatible plugin wrapper around SL-Mar/quantcoder for research-paper to QuantConnect workflows, local QC linting, and optional QuantConnect validation/backtesting through MCP.

plugins.name: quantcoder
plugins.description: Turn quantitative research into QuantConnect LEAN algorithm drafts with local Ollama models and verification-first agent guidance.
